name: John Joyce
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $21,181 for John Joyce in U.S. House, PA-13. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
